## Summary
<!-- Brief description of what this PR does -->

## Spec Change Proposal
<!-- Required for any non-trivial change -->
- **Affected Sections**: 
- **Change Type**: NEW_CAPABILITY | MODIFICATION | BUG_FIX_CODE | BUG_FIX_SPEC
- **Spec Updated**: [ ] Yes / [ ] N/A (no spec impact)

## Version Impact
<!-- Which version number should this bump? -->
- [ ] **Patch** (0.0.x) — Bug fix, no new features
- [ ] **Minor** (0.x.0) — New feature, backwards compatible
- [ ] **Major** (x.0.0) — Breaking change

## Checklist
- [ ] Spec updated (or confirmed no spec impact)
- [ ] Tests pass (`dotnet test` + `npm test`)
- [ ] Build succeeds (`dotnet build` + `npm run build`)
- [ ] No direct commits to main
- [ ] Conventional commit messages used
